markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential use cases and next steps for implementing AI-powered workflows to improve the customer onboarding and follow-up process at Homebase.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The initial focus will be on streamlining the "welcome call" process for new trial signups, including pre-call preparation, conducting the call efficiently, and personalized post-call follow-up emails.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Leveraging AI can automate time-consuming manual tasks, provide relevant talking points/battle cards, and surface the most pertinent resources for follow-ups based on call context.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Starting with this end-to-end workflow allows for iterative improvements, quick wins, and learnings that can be extended to other teams like sales and marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Collaboration between the AI partner and Homebase's customer success team is crucial for understanding processes, refining outputs, and ensuring a seamless adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

## Topics

### Welcome Call Process

  - [Customer success reps make "welcome calls" to new trial signups to provide a consultative experience, understand their needs, recommend relevant features, and drive activation.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Current process involves manually filling out dispositions, recommendations, and follow-up details in Salesforce after each call.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Personalizing follow-up emails by finding and linking relevant resources is very time-consuming.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Potential AI Use Cases

  - [Transcribing calls and using the transcript to auto-populate Salesforce fields and generate personalized follow-up email drafts with relevant resources.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Providing pre-call "battle cards" with relevant talking points and customer/company context based on data enrichment.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Enabling after-call coaching by analyzing calls for areas of improvement, objection handling, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Marcel to review sample call recordings, transcripts, follow-up emails, and training materials from the customer success team.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=2198.0)
  - [Identify 1-2 high-impact workflows to build an initial AI-powered solution.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=2639.0)
  - [Schedule a hands-on working session to collaboratively build and refine the workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [Explore integrating the AI outputs into existing tools like Salesforce.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Pilot the solution with a subset of the customer success team for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
  - [Align the project timeline with Homebase's upcoming company-wide hackathon.](https://fathom.video/share/gbEwzyopJD8cHioxYTYzUpDtqHrB1wmi?tab=summary&timestamp=2236.0)
